chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) A permit issued under this subchapter must be carried in the truck-tractor for which the permit is issued.

(b) A copy of the weight record in the form prescribed by the department must contain the information required by Section 621.410 (Weight Record) (c) and must be:

(1) carried in the truck-tractor if the truck-tractor is:

(A) on a public highway or road; and

(B) transporting an intermodal shipping container that contains cargo; and

(2) presented, on request, to an officer authorized to enforce this subtitle, regardless of whether a weight record is required under Section 621.410 (Weight Record) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.408 — Permit and Weight Record Documents

(a) A permit issued under this subchapter must be carried in the truck-tractor for which the permit is issued.

(b) A copy of the weight record in the form prescribed by the department must contain the information required by Section 621.410 (Weight Record) (c) and must be:

    (1) carried in the truck-tractor if the truck-tractor is:

        (A) on a public highway or road; and

        (B) transporting an intermodal shipping container that contains cargo; and

    (2) presented, on request, to an officer authorized to enforce this subtitle, regardless of whether a weight record is required under Section 621.410 (Weight Record) .

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 3, eff. January 1, 2018.*
